summary: Reused artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr_inbox_runner.py as the governed Trello smoke wrapper. The script loads the incoming params (input_dir, output_xlsx, OCR mode, description, traceability) from the task JSON, delegates to the reviewed pdf_to_excel_ocr.py via --report-json with a bounded timeout, and forwards dry-run flags. It preserves the long-form description in the runtime summary, enforces the success-gate evidence contract (status, total_files, status_counter, excel_written/output_exists/output_size_bytes, OCR sufficiency) and reports partial outcomes when appropriate while keeping the flow strictly read-only except for local XLSX generation.
